prompt: A cinematic, high-contrast black and white portrait of a young woman standing centered in frame, wearing a simple sleeveless black dress. Behind her, the large white numerals “2026” are projected onto a textured dark gray wall. The projection casts sharp shadows and bright highlights across her face and body, splitting her face with light and shadow. She looks directly into the camera with a calm, serious expression. The lighting is dramatic and directional, creating a moody, futuristic atmosphere. Ultra-realistic, shallow depth of field, studio photography, 4k resolution, fine film grain, soft background texture, high contrast monochrome, editorial style, cinematic lighting.
promptEn: A cinematic, high-contrast black and white portrait of a young woman standing centered in frame, wearing a simple sleeveless black dress. Behind her, the large white numerals “2026” are projected onto a textured dark gray wall. The projection casts sharp shadows and bright highlights across her face and body, splitting her face with light and shadow. She looks directly into the camera with a calm, serious expression. The lighting is dramatic and directional, creating a moody, futuristic atmosphere. Ultra-realistic, shallow depth of field, studio photography, 4k resolution, fine film grain, soft background texture, high contrast monochrome, editorial style, cinematic lighting.
promptZh: 一张电影质感、高对比度的黑白肖像，一位年轻女性站在画面中央，身穿简约的黑色无袖连衣裙。在她身后，巨大的白色数字“2026”被投影在纹理丰富的深灰色墙面上。投影在她的面部和身体上投射出锐利的阴影和明亮的高光，将她的脸庞分割在光影之中。她神情平静而严肃，直视镜头。灯光具有戏剧性和方向感，营造出一种忧郁且充满未来感的氛围。超写实，浅景深，影棚摄影，4k 分辨率，细腻的胶片颗粒感，柔和的背景纹理，高对比度单色，编辑风格，电影级布光。
